name: The Redwoods
description:
I was bored eating a shiitake mushroom when this popped up in my mind, even if people only use this for 3 minutes i don’t care, I made it because I wanted to

And this is female only

Also because of how much time I put into this I don’t want it to be scalped so I’m keeping proxy off
creator: Zenko_the_kitsune
